languages.text: {n}Яруб в панике выхватывает меч Себериана. Капитан Зауэрбэк не успевает остановить удар, и клинок вонзается в доспех блюстителя. Внезапно меч, словно стеклянный, разлетается на сотню блестящих осколков. Яруб с недоумением смотрит на оставшуюся в руке гарду. Секунда — и синяя вспышка пронзает незадачливого меровца. Тот с жалобным всхлипом падает замертво.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: Стартуют DL_IzimondShotJarub_cs и DL_JarubArrestedOrDead, DL_KnowIzimondPlasmaPistol, DL_SwordDestroyed

traits.locale_text: {n}Яруб в панике выхватывает меч Себериана. Капитан Зауэрбэк не успевает остановить удар, и клинок вонзается в доспех блюстителя. languages.translation_comment: Стартуют DL_IzimondShotJarub_cs и DL_JarubArrestedOrDead, DL_KnowIzimondPlasmaPistol, DL_SwordDestroyed

languages.text: {n}Panicking, Jarub snatches up Seberian's sword. Captain Sauerback fails to stop the strike, and the blade pierces the enforcer's armour. Without warning, the sword shatters as if it were made of glass, a hundred glittering shards flying in every direction. Jarub blinks in disbelief at the hilt still in his hand. A moment — and a blue flash lances through the hapless Merovian, who drops dead to the ground with a piteous whimper.{/n}

Внезапно меч, словно стеклянный, разлетается на сотню блестящих осколков. Яруб с недоумением смотрит на оставшуюся в руке гарду. Секунда — и синяя вспышка пронзает незадачливого меровца. Тот с жалобным всхлипом падает замертво.{/n}

languages.text: {n}雅鲁布惊慌失措，一把夺过塞贝里安的剑。苏尔贝克上尉没能拦住这一击，剑刃刺穿了执法者的护甲。毫无征兆地，那柄剑像玻璃一样碎裂开来，上百块闪光碎片四散飞溅。雅鲁布难以置信地眨着眼，盯着手里仅剩的剑柄。紧接着，一道蓝色闪光贯穿了这个倒霉的梅罗夫人，他发出一声哀鸣，倒地身亡。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Panicking, Jarub snatches up Seberian's sword. Captain Sauerback fails to stop the strike, and the blade pierces the enforcer's armour. Without warning, the sword shatters as if it were made of glass, a hundred glittering shards flying in every direction. Jarub blinks in disbelief at the hilt still in his hand. A moment — and a blue flash lances through the hapless Merovian, who drops dead to the ground with a piteous whimper.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}雅鲁布惊慌失措，一把夺过塞贝里安的剑。苏尔贝克上尉没能拦住这一击，剑刃刺穿了执法者的护甲。毫无征兆地，那柄剑像玻璃一样碎裂开来，上百块闪光碎片四散飞溅。雅鲁布难以置信地眨着眼，盯着手里仅剩的剑柄。紧接着，一道蓝色闪光贯穿了这个倒霉的梅罗夫人，他发出一声哀鸣，倒地身亡。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Pris de panique, Jarub brandit l'épée de Seberian et parvient à transpercer l'armure du capitaine Sauerback avant que le prévôt puisse l'en empêcher. Mais soudain, l'épée se brise comme si elle était faite de verre, en projetant des centaines d'éclats brillants dans toutes les directions. Jarub cligne des yeux d'un air incrédule, la poignée toujours en main. Un instant plus tard, un éclair bleu traverse le malheureux Merovien, qui s'effondre au sol en poussant un gémissement pitoyable.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Panicking, Jarub snatches up Seberian's sword. Captain Sauerback fails to stop the strike, and the blade pierces the enforcer's armour. Without warning, the sword shatters as if it were made of glass, a hundred glittering shards flying in every direction. Jarub blinks in disbelief at the hilt still in his hand. A moment — and a blue flash lances through the hapless Merovian, who drops dead to the ground with a piteous whimper.{/n}

Un instant plus tard, un éclair bleu traverse le malheureux Merovien, qui s'effondre au sol en poussant un gémissement pitoyable.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Panikleyen Jarub, Seberian'ın kılıcını kapıyor. Yüzbaşı Sauerback darbeyi durduramıyor ve kılıç, infazcının zırhını delip geçiyor. Kılıç uyarı vermeden sanki camdan yapılmış gibi parçalanıyor ve her yöne uçuşan yüzlerce parıltılı kırığa ayrılıyor. Jarub, inanamayarak hâlâ elinde duran kabzaya bakıp gözlerini kırpıştırıyor. Bir an sonra içinden mavi bir ışık kırıntısı geçen bahtsız Merovlu, acınası bir iniltiyle yere yığılıp ölüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Panicking, Jarub snatches up Seberian's sword. Captain Sauerback fails to stop the strike, and the blade pierces the enforcer's armour. Without warning, the sword shatters as if it were made of glass, a hundred glittering shards flying in every direction. Jarub blinks in disbelief at the hilt still in his hand. A moment — and a blue flash lances through the hapless Merovian, who drops dead to the ground with a piteous whimper.{/n}

Kılıç uyarı vermeden sanki camdan yapılmış gibi parçalanıyor ve her yöne uçuşan yüzlerce parıltılı kırığa ayrılıyor. Jarub, inanamayarak hâlâ elinde duran kabzaya bakıp gözlerini kırpıştırıyor. Bir an sonra içinden mavi bir ışık kırıntısı geçen bahtsız Merovlu, acınası bir iniltiyle yere yığılıp ölüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}En su pánico, Jarub toma la espada de Seberian. El capitán Sauerback no consigue detener el ataque y su filo atraviesa la armadura del guardia. Sin previo aviso, la espada estalla como si estuviera hecha de cristal y un centenar de fragmentos relucientes salen disparados en todas las direcciones. Jarub parpadea, incrédulo, mientras observa el pomo que sigue en su mano. En un instante, un destello azul atraviesa al desventurado meroviano, que cae muerto al suelo con un quejido lastimero.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Panicking, Jarub snatches up Seberian's sword. Captain Sauerback fails to stop the strike, and the blade pierces the enforcer's armour. Without warning, the sword shatters as if it were made of glass, a hundred glittering shards flying in every direction. Jarub blinks in disbelief at the hilt still in his hand. A moment — and a blue flash lances through the hapless Merovian, who drops dead to the ground with a piteous whimper.{/n}

Jarub parpadea, incrédulo, mientras observa el pomo que sigue en su mano. En un instante, un destello azul atraviesa al desventurado meroviano, que cae muerto al suelo con un quejido lastimero.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Jarub greift panisch nach Seberians Schwert. Captain Sauerback kann den Hieb nicht abwehren, und die Klinge durchbohrt die Rüstung des Enforcers. Ohne Vorwarnung zersplittert das Schwert, als bestünde es aus Glas, und Hunderte funkelnde Splitter erfüllen die Luft. Jarub schaut ungläubig auf den Griff in seiner Hand. Dann durchfährt ein blauer Blitz den unglückseligen Merovianer, der mit einem erbärmlichen Winseln tot zu Boden sinkt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Panicking, Jarub snatches up Seberian's sword. Captain Sauerback fails to stop the strike, and the blade pierces the enforcer's armour. Without warning, the sword shatters as if it were made of glass, a hundred glittering shards flying in every direction. Jarub blinks in disbelief at the hilt still in his hand. A moment — and a blue flash lances through the hapless Merovian, who drops dead to the ground with a piteous whimper.{/n}

languages.text: {n}パニックになったジャラブはセベリアンの剣を奪い、キャプテン・ザウアーバックは攻撃を止めることができなかった。剣は強制執行官の鎧を貫き、突然、ガラスのように剣が砕け、百個の光る破片が四方八方に飛び散った。ジャラブは信じられない様子で、まだ握っている剣の柄を見つめた。一瞬、青色の光が不幸なメロヴィアンを貫き、彼は悲痛な悲鳴を上げながら地面に倒れた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Panicking, Jarub snatches up Seberian's sword. Captain Sauerback fails to stop the strike, and the blade pierces the enforcer's armour.
